name: Boss fired me after I filed slip and fall claim in Salt Lake—what now?
description: File retaliation claim—illegal to fire you for comp filing.[2]

mainEntity.name: Boss fired me after I filed slip and fall claim in Salt Lake—what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: File retaliation claim—illegal to fire you for comp filing.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Utah/Idaho law prohibits retaliation for workers' comp filings; file a retaliation complaint.** Evidence like timing and comments proves it; remedies include reinstatement, back pay.[1][2] Consult attorney immediately—statute is 180 days. Comp benefits continue regardless. Document all post-injury interactions.
